name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: FirstCash is the leading international operator of pawn stores with 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America, offering pawn loans secured by personal property and retail merchandise sales.
description_long:
FirstCash, Inc. is headquartered in Fort Worth, Texas and operates as the largest international pawn store chain with over 3,300 retail locations. The company was established to serve cash and credit-constrained consumers through collateral-based lending and merchandise retail. FirstCash is publicly traded and included in both the S&P MidCap 400 Index and Russell 2000 Index, employing approximately 22,000 people across the U.S., Latin America, and the United Kingdom. The company's geographic footprint spans 29 U.S. states plus D.C., all Mexican states, and the countries of Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador.

FirstCash's core business model centers on non-recourse pawn loans secured by pledged personal property, meaning the borrower has no obligation to repay if they cannot retrieve their item. The company buys and sells a wide variety of merchandise including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments. Beyond traditional pawn loans, FirstCash offers layaway services with 10% down payment options and gold/precious metal buying services. The company also operates AFF, a wholly owned subsidiary providing lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through over 15,000 merchant partner locations nationwide.

FirstCash distinguishes itself through its massive scale as the international market leader in pawn operations and its diversified revenue streams beyond basic pawn lending. The company's integration of retail sales, gold buying, layaway services, and point-of-sale payment solutions (through AFF) creates multiple customer touchpoints. Their extensive location network—over 3,300 stores—provides accessibility across multiple countries and regions, serving both English and Spanish-speaking markets. The company's public market presence and index inclusion demonstrate institutional credibility and operational maturity.

FirstCash is best suited for consumers needing immediate cash against personal items of value who lack access to traditional credit. The non-recourse nature of pawn loans eliminates collection risk and credit report impact if items aren't redeemed. However, pawn loans involve losing possession of valuables and implicit interest through the loan term, making them more expensive than conventional loans for those with credit access. The company's retail model also means merchandise sold back to consumers may be higher-priced than alternatives, and gold-buying services may not offer competitive rates compared to specialized precious metals dealers.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, Mexico, Guatemala, Colombia, and El Salvador for widespread accessibility
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no personal liability to repay and no credit report impact if item is not redeemed
Instant cash on-the-spot for items of value without credit checks or income verification
Accepts almost any item of value including jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment for purchasing merchandise
Dedicated gold and precious metal buying service for immediate conversion to cash
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 Index) with 22,000+ employees indicating operational stability
cons: Pawn loans result in loss of possession of personal items during the loan term, limiting access to pledged property
Implicit interest costs through shortened loan terms make pawn loans substantially more expensive than traditional personal loans for those with credit access
Retail merchandise sold back to consumers may carry markups higher than market alternatives or online retailers
Gold and precious metal buying rates may not be competitive compared to specialized bullion dealers or certified precious metals appraisers
Limited loan amounts based on item values mean pawn loans cannot serve larger borrowing needs (typically $100-$1,000 range per item)
best_for: Unbanked or credit-constrained consumers needing immediate cash against personal property they own
Individuals seeking short-term liquidity without credit checks, income verification, or credit report impact
People with valuable items (jewelry, electronics, instruments, tools) willing to temporarily forfeit them for cash access
Consumers shopping for used merchandise, sporting goods, or musical instruments at discount prices
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers holding items of value who need immediate cash without credit verification or credit report consequences. The main caveat is that pawn loans result in loss of personal property access during the loan term and carry implicit interest costs significantly higher than traditional lending, making them suitable only when alternatives are genuinely unavailable.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse)
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and platinum buying services with on-the-spot cash payment
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Store locator tool with inventory search functionality
Merchandise buying service ('we buy almost anything of value')
Multi-country operations across North America and Latin America
